title: Add Recently Played section with Live365 iframe

requirements.text: Create a `RecentlyPlayed` component at `frontend/src/components/RecentlyPlayed.tsx` that embeds the Live365 recently played iframe (`<iframe width="450" height="511" frameborder="0" src="https://live365.com/embeds/v1/played/a57949?s=md&m=dark"></iframe>`). Wrap the iframe in a responsive container that caps its max-width and centers it horizontally so it displays correctly on both mobile and desktop. Style the surrounding section using the existing country theme (warm earthy tones, serif headings, woodgrain/rustic accent styling consistent with the rest of the site).

quotes: add <iframe width="450" height="511" frameborder="0" src="https://live365.com/embeds/v1/played/a57949?s=md&m=dark"></iframe> to recently played section

acceptanceCriteria: The component renders the Live365 iframe with src `https://live365.com/embeds/v1/played/a57949?s=md&m=dark`, width 450, height 511, and frameborder 0.
The iframe container has a max-width cap and is horizontally centered.
On mobile viewports the iframe does not overflow or cause horizontal scrolling.
The section heading and surrounding styling match the existing country theme (earthy tones, serif typography).

requirements.text: Embed the `RecentlyPlayed` component on the public Home page (`frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx`), placed after the 'Ways to Listen' section at the bottom of the page.

quotes: add <iframe width="450" height="511" frameborder="0" src="https://live365.com/embeds/v1/played/a57949?s=md&m=dark"></iframe> to recently played section

acceptanceCriteria: The `RecentlyPlayed` component is imported and rendered in `frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx`.
It appears after the 'Ways to Listen' section in the page layout.
The section is visible on the live home page without any route or layout changes.

constraints: Use the exact iframe src URL: https://live365.com/embeds/v1/played/a57949?s=md&m=dark — do not modify query parameters.
Do not modify any file listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
Styling must remain consistent with the existing country theme defined in `frontend/src/index.css` and `frontend/tailwind.config.js`.
nonGoals: Do not alter the OnAirNow component or the Ways to Listen section.
Do not add any additional listening platform cards or external links beyond what is requested.
